design_guidelines.project_name: Clínica Veterinaria Machado - Landing Page Preview
design_guidelines.core_philosophy: Trust, Hygiene, Professionalism, Warmth. A balance between clinical precision and pet-friendly approachability.

scaling.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]

buttons.primary: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#128C7E] shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full
buttons.floating_fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

cards.service: group bg-white border border-slate-100 p-8 rounded-2xl hover:shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-transparent hover:border-green-100 transition-colors

sections.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Left: Typography + CTAs. Right: Large image masked in 'Arch' or 'Organic' shape.
sections.services: Bento Grid style or clean 3-column grid. Icons/Illustrations + Title + Short Desc.
sections.pricing_teaser: Dark background (#022C22). White text. High contrast CTA.
sections.map: Full width or large rounded container. Google Maps iframe.

hero_main.alt: Perro y gato descansando juntos en Clínica Veterinaria Machado
hero_main.description: Dog and cat laying on the ground together

vet_examining.description: Veterinarian examines a dog on an examination table

clinic_interior.description: Brown and white padded armchairs in waiting room

key_phrases: Expertos en el cuidado de su mascota
Tecnología de punta y calidez humana
Su mejor amigo en las mejores manos

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on green backgrounds meets AA standards.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons (like the floating WhatsApp) must have aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts.
Implement a 'Sticky WhatsApp Button' that is always visible on mobile.
The Pricing Teaser section MUST have a dark background (#022C22) with white text to stand out.
Do NOT use a real backend. This is a static sales preview.
Use the 'hero_main' image for the top section. You may use a mask or shape to make it look organic.
For the 'Location' section, embed a Google Map iframe pointing to 'San Pablo, Heredia'.
Ensure all 'Agendar Cita' or 'Consulta' buttons link to the WhatsApp URL.
Add a subtle 'noise' texture overlay to the entire body background for a premium paper feel (opacity 0.03).
Use 'framer-motion' for simple entrance animations (fade up) on the Service cards.
